S

shouldCreateDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should create the Department.
Tests a POST request.
shouldCreateEmployeeInDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should create the Employee in the Department.
Tests a POST request.
shouldDeleteDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should delete the Department.
Tests a DELETE request.
shouldDeleteEmployeeInDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should delete the Employee in the Department.
Tests a DELETE request.
shouldFailValidationWhenCreatingDepartmentWithInvalidDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should fail validation and get '400 Bad Request' error response when creating department with invalid department data.
Tests a POST request.
shouldFailValidationWhenCreatingDepartmentWithInvalidEmployee() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should fail validation and get '400 Bad Request' error response when creating department with invalid employee data.
Tests a POST request.
shouldFailValidationWhenGettingDepartmentByInvalidId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should fail validation and get '400 Bad Request' error response when getting the Department by invalid id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldFailValidationWhenGettingEmployeeInDepartmentByInvalidId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should fail validation and get '400 Bad Request' error response when getting the Employee by invalid id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetBadRequestErrorWhenGettingDepartmentByBadId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get '400 Bad Request' error response when getting the Department by bad id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetBadRequestErrorWhenGettingEmployeeInDepartmentByBadId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get '400 Bad Request' error response when getting the Employee by bad id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetDepartmentById() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get the Department by id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetDepartments() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get the Departments.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetEmployeeInDepartmentById() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get the Employee in the Department by id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetEmployees() - Method in class kp.company.controller.EmployeeControllerTests
Should get the Employees.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetEmployeesInDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get the Employees in the Department.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenGettingDepartmentByAbsentId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when getting the Department by absent id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetNotFoundErrorWhenGettingEmployeeInDepartmentByAbsentId() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should get '404 Not Found' error response when getting the Employee by absent id.
Tests a GET request.
shouldGetTitles() - Method in class kp.company.controller.TitleControllerTests
Should get the Titles.
Tests a GET request.
shouldUpdateDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should update the Department.
Tests a PATCH request.
shouldUpdateEmployeeInDepartment() - Method in class kp.company.controller.DepartmentControllerTests
Should update the Employee in the Department.
Tests a PATCH request.
